navigation.faqsSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about Plexos.

hero.title: Your Money. No Borders.
hero.subtitle: The international card and money app built for the real world. Pay online, get paid from anywhere, and move money across borders — with real exchange rates and zero hidden fees.

services.title: The financial access you deserve
services.subtitle: International payments, zero-fee transfers, and a card accepted worldwide. Built for people who need their money to move as freely as they do.

cards.title: International Debit Card
cards.description: Shop globally, subscribe to any service, book flights — your Plexos card works anywhere Mastercard is accepted. No more declined payments or unavailable regions.

savings.title: Send & Receive Money
savings.description: Send money to family across borders in seconds. Receive payments from clients worldwide. No queues at agencies, no middlemen, no excessive fees eating into your money.

business.title: Global Transfers
business.description: Move money between countries at the real exchange rate. Up to 5x cheaper than traditional banks and remittance services. Your money arrives fast — and whole.

services.bottomText: Whether you're a freelancer getting paid from overseas, supporting family back home, or simply trying to pay for a subscription — Plexos connects you to the global economy, without exceptions.

account.title: One account that opens the world
account.subtitle: Everything you need in one place — built for the way you live, work, and grow your money across borders.

features.cards: Mastercard debit card accepted in 200+ countries
features.investments: Hold USD, EUR, GBP, and more — protect your savings from local currency fluctuations

tools.title: Full control, from anywhere in the world.
tools.subtitle: Instant notifications, spending insights, and complete control over your card — right from the app. No branch visits, no paperwork, no waiting.

rewards.title: Earn 2% Back on Every Purchase
rewards.subtitle: 1% cashback when you buy, plus 1% bonus when you pay. No annual fees, no caps — just real money back in your pocket.
rewards.bottomText: Every purchase puts money back where it belongs. No points to redeem, no hoops to jump through — just automatic cashback on everything you buy, everywhere you pay.

app.title: One app. All your accounts. Total control.
app.subtitle: Send, spend, save, and manage your money from your phone. Real-time notifications, instant transfers, and secure access — anytime, anywhere.
app.qrText: Scan to download the Plexos app
app.ratingText: Trusted by thousands of users across multiple countries.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't

send-abroad.title: Send money home at real rates
send-abroad.description: Transfer money to any country in seconds. Real exchange rates, fees up to 5x lower than remittance services and traditional banks. Your family gets more, every time.

multi-currency.title: Hold multiple currencies, protect your money
multi-currency.description: Keep your money in USD, EUR, GBP, and other major currencies. Shield your savings from local inflation and currency fluctuations — convert when the rate is right.

international-card.title: A card that actually works internationally
international-card.description: A Mastercard debit card accepted in 200+ countries. Pay for subscriptions, shop online, or withdraw cash abroad — no more 'card not supported' messages.

pay-friends.title: Send money to anyone, instantly
pay-friends.description: Transfer money to other Plexos users for free, in seconds. Split bills, pay back a friend, or send a gift — no bank details, no waiting.

real-time.title: Real-time notifications
real-time.description: Know the moment money comes in or goes out. Instant push notifications for every transaction, so you always stay in control.

spending-insights.title: Spending insights
spending-insights.description: See exactly where your money goes. Automatic categories, monthly reports, and trends to help you spend smarter.

virtual-cards.title: Virtual cards for safe payments
virtual-cards.description: Generate a virtual card for online shopping. Your real card details stay hidden, protecting you from fraud.

no-fees.title: Transparent pricing. Always.
no-fees.description: Zero monthly fees, zero annual fees, zero surprises. What you see is what you pay — on every transaction, every time.

homeCards.title: A Card That Works Everywhere You Go
homeCards.subtitle: Choose from a range of card designs that reflect who you are. Every Plexos card works worldwide with Mastercard — accepted at millions of merchants, online and in-store.

details.title: Your card does more than you think
details.subtitle: Pay with Apple Pay, scan a QR code, or tap to pay contactless. Track every transaction, block suspicious charges, and schedule future payments — all from the app.

features.applePay: Add to Apple Pay and Google Pay for instant contactless payments
features.qrCode: Pay by scanning a QR code — fast, secure, no card needed
features.analytics: See all your spending broken down by category, merchant, and month
features.blockCard: Freeze your card or block suspicious transactions in one tap
features.scheduledPayments: Set up recurring payments and never miss a bill again
features.contactless: Tap to pay in-store with contactless — no PIN for small purchases

support.heroSubtitle: Whether you want to browse our Help Centre for solutions or chat with us directly, we've got you — even on a Sunday.

talkToUs.title: Talk to us directly
talkToUs.description1: Speak to our support team in 100+ languages via our secure in-app chat. Tap your profile icon in the top-left corner → Help → scroll down, tap Support to start a chat with us.
talkToUs.description2: Premium plan customers can also call us directly in-app.

readyAnswers.title: Ready-to-go answers
readyAnswers.description: Find detailed responses to common questions in our Help Centre, the fountain of Plexos knowledge.

security.title: Spotted something suspicious?
security.description: If you've spotted some unusual activity on your account, don't panic — but stay vigilant. Report it immediately and we'll help keep your money safe from fraud.

fees.title: Payments
fees.bannerSubtitle: Send, receive, and manage money across the world — with zero fees between Plexos users and real exchange rates on every transfer.
fees.heroSubtitle: Send money to anyone, anywhere in the world — instantly and with zero fees between Plexos users. No middlemen, no delays, no hidden charges.

feature.title: Pay friends and family, instantly and for free
feature.description: Send money between Plexos accounts in seconds, with zero transfer fees. Whether it's to someone next door or across the ocean — send, receive, and manage everything from one app.
feature.disclaimer: Fees may apply for certain payment methods. Terms and Conditions apply.

methods.title: Payment methods built for the way you live

contacts.title: Send to your contacts
contacts.description: Both on Plexos? Just search their name and tap Send. Instant, free, and effortless — no matter where they are.

links.title: Share a payment link
links.description: Generate your unique payment link and share it anywhere. Get paid without sharing bank details — perfect for freelancers, sellers, and side hustles.

global.title: Send money worldwide
global.description: Transfer money across borders at the real exchange rate. Free between Plexos users, and up to 5x cheaper than banks for everyone else.

multiCurrency.title: Hold, convert, and spend in 30+ currencies
multiCurrency.description: Stop losing money to unfair exchange rates. Hold USD, EUR, GBP, and more — convert at the real rate and spend internationally like a local. Preview rates before you convert and lock them in when it works for you.

comparison.title: Why pay more? Compare and save.
comparison.subtitle: Built to be the most affordable way to move money. See how Plexos stacks up against the competition.
comparison.disclaimer: The above information applies when sending money in the national currency of the recipient account. The list of providers is not exhaustive and we plan to add more soon. For all providers, we are showing the costs based on the Standard/Basic plans only. Exchange rates and transfer fees displayed are illustrative and only refreshed every minute. Always check the applicable rate and transfer fees in-app before carrying out your transfer. In-app transfers with Plexos have zero fees.

cards.heroTitle: One card. No borders. No surprises.
cards.heroSubtitle: Spend abroad at the real exchange rate, skip the hidden fees, and pay anywhere Mastercard is accepted — all from your phone.

virtual.title: Practically Indestructible
virtual.description: Always losing your cards? Make them virtual and never worry about losing them again. Simply link them to Apple or Google Pay and start spending securely right away.

banner.subtitle: Available on all plans
banner.title: The new standard in banking
banner.accountSubtitle: Pay internationally without carrying cash. Skip the hidden fees and spend abroad at the real exchange rate — at a fraction of what traditional banks cost.

features.lowFees: Real exchange rates with fees up to 8x lower
features.noCash: No need to carry cash — tap, pay, done

benefits.title: One card. Total control. Zero compromise.
benefits.description: Manage your spending from the app, set custom limits, freeze your card in a tap, and get real-time notifications for every transaction. Your money, your rules.

card1.title: Real-time notifications
card1.description: Know exactly when and where your money is spent — instantly.

card2.title: Instant freeze
card2.description: Lost your card? Freeze it in one tap. Found it? Unfreeze just as fast.

card3.title: Custom spending limits
card3.description: Set daily, weekly, or monthly limits to stay in control of your budget.

collection.title: Cards That Match Your Style — Not Just Your Wallet
collection.subtitle: Discover our exclusive collection of limited-edition cards, collaborations, and seasonal designs — made to stand out wherever you go.
collection.bottomText: Whether you're paying for groceries around the corner or booking a flight across the world — your Plexos card is designed to go wherever life takes you, without the fees holding you back.

security.title: Protection for your cards
security.subtitle: All accounts have 24/7 protection with proactive defenses and a team of specialists. In 2024 alone, we helped prevent over $746M in fraud.

freezeCard.title: In case of doubt, freeze and unfreeze your card in seconds

virtualCard.title: Virtual card data that regenerates after each purchase

controls.title: Customize card controls to spend with greater security

howToGet.title: Get Your Card in Just 3 Easy Steps
howToGet.subtitle: No queues, no delays, no hassle. Get your card and start spending with confidence today.

step1.title: Start for Free
step1.description: Create your free account in minutes — no paperwork needed.

step2.title: Pick Your Card
step2.description: Choose from our exclusive collection of card designs.

step3.title: Use It Instantly
step3.description: Start spending online immediately with your virtual card.

featured.title: Choose the card that fits your life
featured.subtitle: Whether you're shopping online, travelling abroad, or building your savings — there's a Plexos card designed for you.

features.feature2: Free in-app transfers to Plexos users

features.feature1: Up to 3% cashback on every purchase

standard.name: Standard Account
standard.description: For everyday banking essentials: everything you need to manage your money in one place. Send money abroad or stick to a budget — it's never been easier.

plus.name: Plus Plan
plus.description: For the smart spender: unlock extra banking perks like higher limits for spending abroad and purchase insurance, at an affordable price.

premium.name: Premium Plan
premium.description: For your daily upgrade: access exclusive subscriptions, better exchange rates, and unlimited currency exchange.

downloadApp.title: Get the Plexos App
downloadApp.subtitle: Take control of your money from anywhere. Download the Plexos app and start sending, spending, and saving — in seconds.
downloadApp.qrDescription: Point your phone camera at the QR code to get the app
downloadApp.qrAlt: QR code to download the Plexos app
downloadApp.imageAlt: Plexos app interface on a smartphone

regulatory.paragraph1: To find out more about which Plexos entity you receive services from, please check our corresponding FAQ page. If you have any other questions, please reach out to us via the in-app chat in the Plexos app.
regulatory.paragraph2: Plexos Group Ltd is registered in England and Wales (No. 12345678), is authorised by the Financial Conduct Authority to offer e-money and payment services under the Electronic Money Regulations 2011 (FRN: 987654). Plexos is a trading name of Plexos Group Ltd.
regulatory.paragraph3: The registered address of Plexos Group Ltd is at 123 Financial Street, London, EC1A 1BB, United Kingdom. You can read more about our terms and policies on our website.

cookies.title: Choose your cookies
cookies.description: Cookies help us to enhance your experience, tailor ads to your interests, and improve our website.

referral.title: You were invited to Plexos
referral.subtitle: Send money globally at great exchange rates.
referral.disclaimer: We will share very limited information about your account set-up and activity with the person who referred you to Plexos. This ensures that the appropriate parties can receive referral rewards if applicable.

errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number
errors.connectionError: Connection error. Please check your internet and try again.
errors.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: You're all set!
success.message: Referral claimed successfully. Download Plexos and complete your registration to activate your reward.

waitlist.title: Send and receive money without the fees
waitlist.subtitle: An international card and money app that finally works for you. Transfer money with zero fees, receive payments from anywhere, and pay for anything online — no more blocked cards or unfair charges.
waitlist.disclaimer: We'll only use your info to send you launch updates. No spam, ever. You can unsubscribe at any time.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number
errors.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: You're on the list
success.message: We'll notify you as soon as Plexos launches. Keep an eye on your inbox.
success.shareMessage: Know someone who needs this? Share Plexos with them.

cookieSettings.title: Cookie settings
cookieSettings.description: Cookies help us to enhance your experience, tailor ads to your interests, and improve our website.
cookieSettings.findOutMore: Find out more on different cookie categories by expanding each cookie category below. Read our
cookieSettings.learnMoreText: to learn more about how we use cookies and how to adjust your cookie preferences if you change your mind.

essential.title: Essential cookies
essential.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in, or filling in forms.

preferences.title: Preferences cookies
preferences.description: These cookies allow the website to remember choices you make (such as your language or region) and provide enhanced, more personal features.

analytics.title: Analytics cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve our services.

advertising.title: Advertising cookies
advertising.description: These cookies are used to make advertising messages more relevant to you. They perform functions like preventing the same ad from continuously reappearing and ensuring that ads are properly displayed.
